snippets: Tourist brochures are available in Amberg.
Brochures can be collected at the Tourist Information office.
Brochures are also available online.
City maps are available for visitors.
Walking guides are available for Amberg.
Cycling maps are available for the region.
Event calendars are available for Amberg.
Regional tour brochures are available for Amberg-Sulzbach.
Hiking trail brochures are available.
An online booking system is available for Amberg tourism services.
The booking system includes accommodation reservations.
The booking system includes experience reservations.
The booking system includes voucher purchases.
The booking portal is accessible via the official tourism website.
Souvenirs are sold at the Tourist Information office.
Some souvenirs are only available for in-store purchase.
Some souvenirs can be ordered online.
Online orders require advance payment.
Payment for orders is made via bank transfer.
Shipping is available within Germany only.
Shipping is handled via DHL.
The Bierstadt Steinkrugseidl is a stone beer stein.
The price of the stone beer stein is 12.90 euros.
The stone beer stein is available only in-store.
The Amberger Bierfest glass has a capacity of 0.3 liters.
The price of the Bierfest glass is 3.00 euros.
The Bierfest glass is available only in-store.
The Bierbrand Sterk is a distilled spirit made from strong beer.
The Bierbrand Sterk has a volume of 0.35 liters.
The Bierbrand Sterk has 40 percent alcohol content.
The price of Bierbrand Sterk is 9.50 euros.
The Bierbrand Sterk is available only in-store.
The Kummert Bräu Bockbierbrand is a distilled beer spirit.
The Bockbierbrand has a volume of 0.5 liters.
The Bockbierbrand has 40 percent alcohol content.
The price of the Bockbierbrand is 22.90 euros.
The Bockbierbrand is available only in-store.
A bottle opener with Bierstadt Amberg branding is available.
The price of the bottle opener is 5.90 euros.
The bottle opener is available for shipping.
A wooden beer stein lid is available as a souvenir.
The price of the beer stein lid is 6.50 euros.
The beer stein lid is available for shipping.
A Kühlschrankmagnet with Bierstadt Amberg branding is available.
The price of the magnet is 4.00 euros.
The magnet is available for shipping.
The Amberg magnet series includes five designs.
Each magnet costs 4.00 euros.
A full set of magnets costs 20.00 euros.
The magnet series is available for shipping.
The book Alles Amberg contains over 50 illustrations.
The book Alles Amberg includes curiosities and stories.
The price of Alles Amberg is 24.90 euros.
The book is available for shipping.
The book Portrait einer Stadt is available in English.
The book describes the development of Amberg.
The price of Portrait einer Stadt is 29.50 euros.
The book is available for shipping.
The guide Das Gelbe vom Ei is an art-historical guide.
The guide is available in German and English.
The guide includes tour suggestions.
The price of the guide is 12.90 euros.
The guide is available for shipping.
The Amberg Memo is a memory game with 72 pieces.
The memory game features city sights.
The price of the memory game is 19.90 euros.
The memory game is available for shipping.
The Amberger Schafkopfspiel is a traditional card game.
The card game features historical motifs.
The price of the card game is 5.00 euros.
The card game is available for shipping.
A zero-euro collector banknote is available.
The banknote includes real security features.
Each banknote has a unique serial number.
The edition is limited to 3,000 pieces.
The price of the banknote is 2.00 euros.
The banknote is available for shipping.
A windlight made of bisque porcelain is available.
The windlight shows a historic city view from 1583.
The image is based on a woodcut by Hanns Kannlpaldung.
The windlight uses a lithophane technique.
The price of the windlight is 12.50 euros.
The windlight is available for shipping.
A hand fan with Amberg old town motifs is available.
The fan features colorful designs.
The price of the fan is 5.50 euros.
The fan is available for shipping.
A wooden Brotzeitbrettl is available.
The board measures 22.5 by 12.5 centimeters.
The price of the board is 7.50 euros.
The board is available for shipping.
An umbrella with Amberg branding is available.
The umbrella has a diameter of approximately 95 centimeters.
The umbrella is made from recycled PET bottles.
The umbrella handle is made of bamboo.
The price of the umbrella is 19.50 euros.
The umbrella is available for shipping.
A fabric tote bag with a city silhouette is available.
The price of the tote bag is 3.00 euros.
The tote bag is available for shipping.
A sports drawstring bag is available.
A colorful Amberg mug is available.
The price of the colorful mug is 11.50 euros.
The colorful mug is available only in-store.
A white Amberg mug with city drawings is available.
The price of the white mug is 9.50 euros.
The white mug is available only in-store.
Some souvenir items are produced by local social enterprises.
Souvenirs reflect the cultural identity of Amberg.
Souvenirs include both practical and decorative items.
